form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 6th of 8 at Moranbah 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, 15 len behind Rockabilly carrying 55kg at $17. Previously second-up second last of 10 at Rockhampton 2yo Hcp on December 9 over 1050m, on a slow track; 20 len behind Swift Dragon carrying 59kg at $51. No easier this time and happy to leave out.
